test_cases.title: /evolve --target all completes full analysis-to-apply loop
test_cases.description: Verify end-to-end flow: analyze.py auto-run → Judge subprocess → suggestion generation → TUI approval → apply with backup
steps: Ensure evolution-data/daily/ has >= 3 days of data
Verify analyze.py executes and produces JSON report
Verify LLM Judge subprocess spawns with glm-5.1
Verify suggestions displayed in TUI with severity/confidence
Approve one suggestion (y), skip another (n), quit (q)
Verify backup file created in evolution-data/backups/

test_cases.title: /evolve-apply resumes pending suggestions
test_cases.description: After quitting mid-approval in /evolve, verify /evolve-apply shows remaining suggestions
steps: Run /evolve and quit with pending suggestions remaining
Verify only pending suggestions are shown
Verify all suggestions reach terminal state in pending.json

test_cases.title: /evolve-stats displays signal dashboard
test_cases.description: Verify stats command reads daily/ and tool-stats.json, renders 7-day summary
steps: Verify tool calls total is displayed
Verify skill trigger ranking is displayed
Verify tool failure rate Top 5 is displayed

test_cases.title: /evolve-rollback restores file from backup
test_cases.description: Verify rollback restores original file and records in history

test_cases.title: Auto-trigger creates flag on token decline
test_cases.description: When token efficiency declines 3 consecutive days, flag file is created
steps: Verify daily/ has data showing 3-day token increase
Verify session_start output contains hint message

test_cases.title: Auto-trigger creates flag on skill dormant
test_cases.description: Skills not triggered for >30 days trigger dormant flag
steps: Verify skill-triggers.json has entries with lastTriggered > 30 days ago
Verify hint message lists dormant skill names

test_cases.title: Auto-trigger skips on insufficient data (division-by-zero protection)
test_cases.description: When no historical data exists, monitor does not crash or create false flags

test_cases.title: /evolve auto-executes analyze.py when no recent report
test_cases.description: When reports/ has no JSON within 7 days, /evolve auto-runs analyze.py
steps: Verify new JSON report is generated
Verify Judge consumes the new report

test_cases.title: /evolve shows error when analyze.py fails
test_cases.description: When Python is missing or analyze.py errors, /evolve shows stderr
steps: Verify error message contains stderr output
Verify Pi continues to function (not blocked)

test_cases.title: Diff conflict skips suggestion without blocking others
test_cases.description: When target file has changed and diff doesn't apply, that suggestion is skipped
steps: Manually modify a target file to create diff conflict
Run /evolve and approve the conflicting suggestion
Verify other suggestions are still processed

test_cases.title: /evolve returns 0 suggestions gracefully
test_cases.description: With insufficient data, Judge returns 0 suggestions without error
steps: Verify 0 suggestions does not cause error
Verify pending.json written with empty suggestions array

test_cases.title: Extension installs and loads correctly
test_cases.description: Symlink evolution-engine to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/ and verify Pi loads it
